setup.title: Initial Setup
setup.subtitle: Create the first admin account
setup.createFailed: Failed to create account. Please try again.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Sign up to access the dashboard
register.pendingMsg: Your account has been created and is awaiting administrator approval. You'll be able to sign in once it's activated.
register.disabled: Registration is currently closed by the administrator.
register.duplicate: Username or email already in use.

errors.pending: Your account is awaiting administrator approval.
errors.inactive: Your account has been deactivated. Please contact your administrator.
errors.emailCollision: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in with your password, then link this provider from account settings.
errors.email_collision: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in with your password, then link this provider from account settings.
errors.alreadyLinked: This account is already linked to another user.
errors.already_linked: This account is already linked to another user.
errors.session_expired: Your session expired. Please try again.
errors.link_failed: Failed to link the provider. Please try again.
errors.missing_params: Sign-in failed due to a missing parameter.
errors.invalid_state: Sign-in flow is invalid or expired. Please try again.
errors.state_mismatch: Sign-in security check failed. Please try again.
errors.provider_disabled: This sign-in provider is currently disabled.
errors.providerNotConfigured: Sign-in with {{provider}} is not configured on this server. Contact your administrator.

callback.failedHint: If this keeps happening, contact your administrator.
